info.name: Sports Backend 2.0
info.description:
Sports Backend 2.0 — three API surfaces:

• Web API (/api/web/*) — requires `token: {{webToken}}` header. User-authenticated routes also need `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.
• Mobile API (/api/mobile/*) — requires `token: {{mobileToken}}` header.
• Proxy/Sports API (/api/sports/*) — requires `token: {{sportsToken}}` header.

variable.description: JWT from login response — auto-set by Login request
JWT from login response — auto-set by Login request

item.name: 🌐 Web API
item.description: All routes under /api/web. Every request requires the `token: {{webToken}}` header (verifyWebApi middleware). Routes marked [AUTH] additionally require `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "role": "user",
  "image": null,
  "permissions": { "canRead": true, "canWrite": false, "canDelete": false },
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: accessToken expires in 15m. refreshToken expires in 7d.

request.description: Note: 'deleta-all' typo exists in the actual route.

body.description: Body is a raw array (not wrapped in object).
Note: full path is /api/web/contact-us/contact-us (duplicate segment in route definition).

request.description: Any path after /fixtures/ is forwarded to CricBuzz RapidAPI.

item.name: 📱 Mobile API
item.description: All routes under /api/mobile. Every request requires `token: {{mobileToken}}` header (verifyMobileApi middleware). Response data uses compressed field names to reduce payload size.

request.description: Returns the caller's detected IP address.
Returns all active live matches sorted by position. Compressed fields: mid, fid, l (ln/li), mi (mt/mti/ih), tm (t1/t2).
matchId is the numeric match `id` (not MongoDB _id). Returns active streams sorted by position. Compressed fields: sid, t, ip, res, plt, st, pw, lw, rs, url, hdr, sk.
Paginated, status=1 only, newest first. Compressed fields: id, t, cat, lid, li, dt, sd, vt, yt, tt, hi, fid, vids.
Paginated, status=1 only, newest first. Compressed fields: id, t, cat, src, lid, li, sl, url, img, desc, dt.
Returns platform-specific settings: name, uniqueId, status, logo, socialMedia, notificationSettings, platformSettings (androidSettings). Creates defaults if none exist.
Returns company_name, site_title, terms, policy, contact_us, social links, site_logo, site_icon.

item.name: ⚡ Proxy / Sports API
item.description: All routes under /api/sports. Every request requires `token: {{sportsToken}}` header (verifyProxyApi middleware). All routes are Redis cached. Wildcards forward to upstream APIs.

item.name: SportMonks V3
item.description: Proxied to SPORTMONKS_FOOTBALL_URL/v3. Append any SportMonks V3 path after /monk/v3.

item.name: SportMonks V4
item.description: Proxied to SPORTMONKS_FOOTBALL_URL/v4. Append any SportMonks V4 path after /monk/v4.

item.name: RapidAPI Football V3
item.description: Proxied to RAPID_API_FOOTBALL_URL. Fixtures and leagues responses are enriched with live-match flags and selected-league filtering.

request.description: Fixtures filtered to selected leagues only. Each fixture gets `rex_value: true` if it matches a live match fixture_id.
Filtered to selected leagues only. Each league gets `news: true|false` flag.
